a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Which countries include mumps vaccines in their vaccination
This shows which countries provide and recommend mumps vaccines through routine services. People may still be able to
receive the vaccine if it's not in the routine schedule – it might be optional or available commercially.
Note: Improved mumps vaccines became available for the first time in 1967.
